name: Sarajevo / WWI outbreak
mechanism: Assassination + rigid alliance commitments + mobilization timetables turned a local crisis into great-power war.
policy_success: none — deterrence and diplomacy both failed

name: Munich Agreement
mechanism: Concession to a revisionist power raised, not lowered, its appetite.

name: Pearl Harbor
mechanism: Oil/scrap embargo on Japan created a use-it-or-lose-it incentive for a first strike.
policy_failure: embargo without deterrent posture invited attack

name: Cuban Missile Crisis
mechanism: Quarantine + secret missile-trade backchannel let both sides retreat without losing face.
policy_failure: initial intelligence gap nearly triggered escalation

name: 1973 Oil Embargo / Yom Kippur
mechanism: Producer embargo weaponized supply during a regional war; price quadrupled.

name: Iranian Revolution / 2nd oil shock
mechanism: Regime collapse cut output; panic buying amplified the shortfall.

name: Iran-Iraq Tanker War
mechanism: Attacks on Gulf shipping near Hormuz threatened to choke ~20% of seaborne oil.
policy_success: reflagging + escort coalition kept lanes open
policy_failure: slow initial response raised risk premium

name: Gulf War (Kuwait invasion)
mechanism: Invasion of an oil state spiked prices; broad coalition reversed it quickly.

name: Abqaiq drone attack
mechanism: Strike on Saudi processing briefly removed ~5% of global supply.

name: Russia-Ukraine full-scale invasion
mechanism: Invasion + sanctions disrupted energy/grain, fueling global inflation.

name: Crimea annexation
mechanism: Hybrid tactics below the threshold of overt war achieved annexation cheaply.
policy_failure: weak initial response emboldened later invasion

name: Korean War
mechanism: Misread signals of US commitment invited invasion; great powers drawn in.

name: Soviet invasion of Afghanistan
mechanism: Intervention to prop a client became an unwinnable proxy war.

name: Iraq War
mechanism: Flawed WMD intelligence + no stabilization plan produced insurgency.

name: Suez Crisis
mechanism: Canal seizure + Anglo-French-Israeli operation reversed by US financial pressure.

name: Korea 2017 nuclear standoff
mechanism: Escalatory rhetoric + tests gave way to summitry and managed deterrence.

name: Kargil conflict
mechanism: Limited war under a nuclear shadow; external pressure forced withdrawal.

name: Russia-Georgia war
mechanism: Frozen conflict reignited into a short, sharp war.

name: Soviet collapse
mechanism: Economic stagnation + legitimacy loss dissolved a superpower without great-power war.

name: Prague Spring suppression
mechanism: Bloc intervention crushed reform to preserve hegemony.

name: Global Financial Crisis
mechanism: Housing leverage + opaque derivatives + funding runs cascaded globally.

name: Asian Financial Crisis
mechanism: Pegged currencies + hot-money reversal triggered contagious devaluations.

name: Russia default + LTCM
mechanism: Sovereign default + leveraged fund blowup threatened systemic contagion.

name: Latin American debt crisis
mechanism: Dollar-rate shock made external debt unpayable across the region.

name: Eurozone sovereign crisis
mechanism: Currency union without fiscal union let sovereign stress threaten the bloc.

name: Weimar hyperinflation
mechanism: Reparations + monetization destroyed the currency.

name: Volcker disinflation
mechanism: Sharp rate hikes broke entrenched inflation at the cost of recession.

name: 1970s stagflation
mechanism: Supply shocks + accommodative policy produced stagnation with inflation.

name: Post-COVID inflation surge
mechanism: Demand rebound + supply bottlenecks + stimulus drove multi-decade-high inflation.

name: Great Depression
mechanism: Crash + bank runs + tariff/gold-standard rigidity caused debt-deflation.

name: Stuxnet
mechanism: Targeted malware physically degraded centrifuges — covert kinetic-equivalent effect.

name: NotPetya
mechanism: Supply-chain wiper spread uncontrollably, causing global collateral damage.

name: Estonia cyberattacks
mechanism: DDoS coercion against a digitized state during a political dispute.

name: SolarWinds compromise
mechanism: Trusted software update weaponized for broad espionage.

name: GenAI disinformation risk
mechanism: Cheap synthetic media erodes evidentiary trust in crises.

name: COVID-19 pandemic
mechanism: Novel pathogen + lockdowns shocked supply, demand, and mobility simultaneously.

name: Spanish Flu
mechanism: Wartime mobility spread a lethal influenza in waves.

name: 2007-08 food price crisis
mechanism: Biofuels + weather + export bans spiked staple prices, triggering riots.

name: Arab Spring
mechanism: Food/price stress + youth unemployment + repression ignited cascading uprisings.

name: Fukushima disaster
mechanism: Tsunami-driven nuclear accident reversed nuclear policy and reshaped energy mix.

name: Able Archer scare
mechanism: A NATO exercise was nearly misread as a first-strike cover; both sides stepped back.
policy_failure: exercise realism + thin comms raised risk

name: Y2K
mechanism: Date-rollover bug threatened systemic IT failure; mass remediation averted it.

name: Sino-Soviet border crisis
mechanism: Border clashes risked nuclear escalation; signaling + diplomacy de-escalated.

name: SARS contained
mechanism: Aggressive case isolation + travel measures stopped a potential pandemic.

name: Ebola West Africa contained
mechanism: Late but eventually effective international response prevented global spread.

name: Norwegian rocket incident
mechanism: A research rocket triggered nuclear alert; correct judgment averted launch.

name: 2008-09 depression averted
mechanism: Coordinated stimulus + backstops prevented a second Great Depression.

name: EM default cascade averted (COVID)
mechanism: IMF/SDR liquidity + debt-service suspension prevented an EM default wave.

name: US debt-ceiling resolution
mechanism: Last-minute deal averted a technical US default and market dislocation.

name: Taiwan Strait 1996 crisis
mechanism: Missile tests + carrier deployment ended without conflict via deterrence signaling.
